supervisor.note: No external supervisor is running in this session; state.json is the recovery boundary.

resume.new_terminal_entry: 读取 state.json 的 resume.startup_instruction 并执行，不要要求用户复制完整指令。
resume.startup_instruction: 使用 linux-alignment skill。读取 state.json 和 Documentation/Linux26-Roadmap.md，按 state.json 从 current_patch.status=review_clean 继续长期 Linux2.6 alignment。严格遵守 boundaries.stop_policy：一直循环执行 next_patch，跨 stage 也继续；每轮选择一个窄差异点，先读 Linux2.6 参考和 Lite 当前实现，写 Linux Alignment Report/mapping ledger，修改代码，运行 make -j4、make smoke-128、make smoke-512，更新 state.json 和 review 文档，commit，review，amend 到 review_clean，然后继续。只有 boundaries.stop_policy.allowed_stop_conditions 中的条件命中时才停止；如果停止，输出命中的具体停止条件。

boundaries.stage_transition: When the active stage has no remaining narrow in-scope patch, update active_stage to the next roadmap stage and continue automatically. Do not stop just because the next patch crosses a stage boundary.

stop_policy.on_stop: State the exact allowed stop condition that was hit. If no allowed stop condition was hit, continue the loop instead of stopping.

stage_plan.name: NVMe Host and Storage Debug Cleanup
Buffer Cache, Page Cache, and Writeback

current_patch.summary: Add Linux's __get_dma_pages helper as a GFP_DMA wrapper over __get_free_pages.

commit.note: The exact final commit hash is obtained from git log because embedding it would change the hash.

next_patch.candidate: After review_clean, continue Stage 4 by auditing the next narrow MM/lib primitive difference against linux2.6 radix-tree, idr, page_alloc, slab, vmalloc, or rmap references.
